aoi_name: Budapest Parliament Danube no-flood control AOI
reasons: AOI has high historical flood exposure, but this only increases concern when active triggers are present. | No rainfall trigger is present, so historical exposure and satellite changes are treated as context rather than active flood-risk evidence.

AOI has high historical flood exposure, but this only increases concern when active triggers are present. | Rainfall exceeds 20 mm, indicating a possible water-risk trigger. | Historical AOI exposure contributes 2 points because an active rainfall trigger is present. | Sentinel-1 shows possible surface-water-change candidates during a rainfall-triggered event window.

aoi_name: Houston Hurricane Beryl urban flood AOI
reasons: AOI has high historical flood exposure, but this only increases concern when active triggers are present. | Rainfall exceeds 20 mm, indicating a possible water-risk trigger. | Rainfall exceeds 40 mm, indicating a stronger water-risk trigger. | Rainfall exceeds 75 mm, indicating an extreme rainfall trigger. | Historical AOI exposure contributes 2 points because an active rainfall trigger is present. | Sentinel-1 shows possible surface-water-change candidates during a rainfall-triggered event window.

AOI has high historical flood exposure, but this only increases concern when active triggers are present. | No rainfall trigger is present, so historical exposure and satellite changes are treated as context rather than active flood-risk evidence.
